content.text: {"title":"User signs in from CLI","slug":"user-signs-in-from-cli","intent":"A user needs authenticated CLI access before managing deployments.","story":"The user runs the login command.","expected_behavior":"The command starts authentication and stores usable session state.","boundaries":"Password recovery is not covered.","auditable_claims":["The login command is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["cli: login"],"docs":[]}}
